API Reference

Модули роутеров

routers.auth.validate_auth_user(login: str = Form(PydanticUndefined), password: str = Form(PydanticUndefined), session: Session = Depends(dependency=<function create_session>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
routers.auth.auth_user(user: UserSchema = Depends(dependency=<function validate_auth_user>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
routers.auth.get_current_user(creds: HTTPAuthorizationCredentials = Depends(dependency=<fastapi.security.http.HTTPBearer object>, use_cache=True, scope=None), session: Session = Depends(dependency=<function create_session>, use_cache=True, scope=None)) → UserPublicSchema[source]
routers.auth.user_self_info(user=Depends(dependency=<function get_current_user>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
routers.auth.is_permission(user: PermissionSchema = Depends(dependency=<function get_permissions>, use_cache=True, scope=None)) → PermissionSchema[source]
routers.auth.insert_employee(name: str = Form(PydanticUndefined), surname: str = Form(PydanticUndefined), login: str = Form(PydanticUndefined), password: str = Form(PydanticUndefined), password2: str = Form(PydanticUndefined), id_job: int = Form(PydanticUndefined), session: Session = Depends(dependency=<function create_session>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
routers.manager.get_all_childrens(boss_id: int, session: Session = Depends(dependency=<function create_session>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
routers.manager.get_childrens_sales(boss_id: int, session: Session = Depends(dependency=<function create_session>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
routers.manager.dismiss_employee(id: int, boss_id: int, session: Session = Depends(dependency=<function create_session>, use_cache=True, scope=None), permissions: PermissionSchema = Depends(dependency=<function get_permissions>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
routers.sales.insert_product(name: str, price: int, id_category: int, quantity_at_storage: int, session: Session = Depends(dependency=<function create_session>, use_cache=True, scope=None), permissions: PermissionSchema = Depends(dependency=<function get_permissions>, use_cache=True, scope=None)) → dict[source]
routers.sales.insert_category(name: str, session: Session = Depends(dependency=<function create_session>, use_cache=True, scope=None), permissions: PermissionSchema = Depends(dependency=<function get_permissions>, use_cache=True, scope=None)) → dict[source]
routers.sales.all_products(session: Session = Depends(dependency=<function create_session>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
routers.sales.insert_job(name: str, permission_id: int, session: Session = Depends(dependency=<function create_session>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
routers.sales.create_receipt(created_at: datetime, user: UserPublicSchema = Depends(dependency=<function get_current_user>, use_cache=True, scope=None), session: Session = Depends(dependency=<function create_session>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
routers.sales.insert_sale(id_product: int, quantity: int, receipt_id: int, session: Session = Depends(dependency=<function create_session>, use_cache=True, scope=None), permissions: PermissionSchema = Depends(dependency=<function get_permissions>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]

routers.sales.all_jobs(session: Session = Depends(dependency=<function create_session>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
routers.sales.all_receipts(session: Session = Depends(dependency=<function create_session>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
routers.sales.all_employees(session: Session = Depends(dependency=<function create_session>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
routers.sales.all_sales(session: Session = Depends(dependency=<function create_session>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
routers.sales.add_boss(id: int, boss_id: int, session: Session = Depends(dependency=<function create_session>, use_cache=True, scope=None), permissions: PermissionSchema = Depends(dependency=<function get_permissions>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
routers.sales.update_product(product_id: int, price: int | None = None, quantity_at_storage: int | None = None, session: Session = Depends(dependency=<function create_session>, use_cache=True, scope=None), permissions: PermissionSchema = Depends(dependency=<function get_permissions>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
routers.sales.delete_product(id: int, session: Session = Depends(dependency=<function create_session>, use_cache=True, scope=None), permissions: PermissionSchema = Depends(dependency=<function get_permissions>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
routers.sales.product_by_id(id: int, session: Session = Depends(dependency=<function create_session>, use_cache=True, scope=None), permissions: PermissionSchema = Depends(dependency=<function get_permissions>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
routers.sales.filtered_products(category_id: int | None, min_price: float = 0, max_price: float = 100000000, session: Session = Depends(dependency=<function create_session>, use_cache=True, scope=None), permissions: PermissionSchema = Depends(dependency=<function get_permissions>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
routers.sales.products_by_category(category_id: int, session: Session = Depends(dependency=<function create_session>, use_cache=True, scope=None), permissions: PermissionSchema = Depends(dependency=<function get_permissions>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
routers.sales.employee_sales(id: int, session: Session = Depends(dependency=<function create_session>, use_cache=True, scope=None), permissions: PermissionSchema = Depends(dependency=<function get_permissions>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
routers.sales.sales_products(min_sum: int | None = None, max_sum: int | None = None, min_date: datetime | None = None, max_date: datetime | None = None, product_id: int | None = None, employee_id: int | None = None, session: Session = Depends(dependency=<function create_session>, use_cache=True, scope=None), permissions: PermissionSchema = Depends(dependency=<function get_permissions>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
routers.sales.add_permission(permisions: PermissionSchema, session: Session = Depends(dependency=<function create_session>, use_cache=True, scope=None), permissions: PermissionSchema = Depends(dependency=<function get_permissions>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
routers.sales.all_permissions(session: Session = Depends(dependency=<function create_session>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
routers.sales.sales_by_receipt(id_receipt: int, session: Session = Depends(dependency=<function create_session>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
routers.sales.products_to_buy(red_quantity: int, session: Session = Depends(dependency=<function create_session>, use_cache=True, scope=None), permissions: PermissionSchema = Depends(dependency=<function get_permissions>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]
async routers.sales.get_receipt_pdf(receipt_id: int, session: Session = Depends(dependency=<function create_session>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: UserPublicSchema = Depends(dependency=<function get_current_user>, use_cache=True, scope=None)) → StreamingResponse[source]
async routers.sales.send_receipt(receipt_id: int, email_address: str, session: Session = Depends(dependency=<function create_session>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: UserPublicSchema = Depends(dependency=<function get_current_user>, use_cache=True, scope=None)) → dict[source]

Отправка PDF чека на указанный email

Parameters:

  • receipt_id – ID чека

  • email_address – Email для отправки

  • session – Сессия БД

  • current_user – Текущий пользователь

  • pdf_service – PDF сервис

Returns:

Статус отправки

Return type:

dict

Схемы Pydantic

class schemas.schemas.TokenSchema(*, access_token: str, token_type: str)[source]

Bases: BaseModel

access_token: str
token_type: str
model_config = {'from_attributes': True}

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class schemas.schemas.UserPublicSchema(*, id: int, name: str, surname: str, id_job: int, boss: int | None = None)[source]

Bases: BaseModel

id: int
name: str
surname: str
id_job: int
boss: int | None
model_config = {'from_attributes': True}

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class schemas.schemas.UserSchema(*, id: int, name: str, surname: str, id_job: int, boss: int | None = None, login: str, permission_id: int)[source]

Bases: UserPublicSchema

login: str
permission_id: int
model_config = {'from_attributes': True}

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class schemas.schemas.JobSchema(*, id: int, name: str, permission_id: int)[source]

Bases: BaseModel

id: int
name: str
permission_id: int
model_config = {'from_attributes': True}

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class schemas.schemas.CategorySchema(*, id: int, name: str)[source]

Bases: BaseModel

id: int
name: str
model_config = {'from_attributes': True}

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class schemas.schemas.ProductSchema(*, id: int, name: str, price: int, quantity_at_storage: int, category: CategorySchema)[source]

Bases: BaseModel

id: int
name: str
price: int
quantity_at_storage: int
category: CategorySchema
model_config = {'from_attributes': True}

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class schemas.schemas.SaleSchema(**data: Any)[source]

Bases: BaseModel

id: int
quantity: int
id_receipt: int
product: ProductSchema
receipt: ReceiptSchema
model_config = {'from_attributes': True}

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class schemas.schemas.ReceiptSchema(*, id: int, created_at: datetime, employee: UserPublicSchema)[source]

Bases: BaseModel

id: int
created_at: datetime
employee: UserPublicSchema
model_config = {'from_attributes': True}

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class schemas.schemas.PermissionSchema(*, id: int | None = None, make_sales: bool, add_categories: bool, add_products: bool, redact_products: bool, add_jobs: bool, add_boss: bool)[source]

Bases: BaseModel

id: int | None
make_sales: bool
add_categories: bool
add_products: bool
redact_products: bool
add_jobs: bool
add_boss: bool
model_config = {'from_attributes': True}

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

Модели базы данных

class models.models.Base(**kwargs: Any)[source]

Bases: DeclarativeBase

__init__(**kwargs: Any) → None

A simple constructor that allows initialization from kwargs.

Sets attributes on the constructed instance using the names and values in kwargs.

Only keys that are present as attributes of the instance’s class are allowed. These could be, for example, any mapped columns or relationships.

class models.models.Category(**kwargs)[source]

Bases: Base

id: Mapped[int]
name: Mapped[str]
products: Mapped[list[Product]]
__init__(**kwargs)

A simple constructor that allows initialization from kwargs.

Sets attributes on the constructed instance using the names and values in kwargs.

Only keys that are present as attributes of the instance’s class are allowed. These could be, for example, any mapped columns or relationships.

class models.models.Product(**kwargs)[source]

Bases: Base

price: Mapped[int]
id_category: Mapped[int]
quantity_at_storage: Mapped[int]
sales: Mapped[list[Sale]]
category: Mapped[Category]
validate_price(key, price)[source]

Sets attributes on the constructed instance using the names and values in kwargs.
